title: Jay Sebring.... Cutting to the Truth
original_title: Jay Sebring… Cutting to the Truth
overview: An illuminating portrait of Jay Sebring — the long-forgotten artist, designer, and entrepreneur who created a billion-dollar hair & beauty industry and defined iconic Hollywood styles for men.
